title: Poori Factory me Bijli ki Fitting (Turnkey Electrification)
description: Nayi factory ya building me wires dalne se lekar main boards lagane tak ka saara kaam hum khud karte hain. Aapko sirf switch dabana hoga, baki sab hum taiyaar karke denge.
features: Badi power lines ki piping aur cabling ka kaam
Sarkari approval aur safety inspection pas karwana
Transformer aur baday generators lagana aur chalana
Factory chalu karne se pehle poori checking aur testing karna

title: Apni Pasand ka Bijli Board Banwayein (Custom Panel)
description: Aap hume batayein aapko kaisa board chahiye ya aapki factory me kaunsi machine chalani hai. Hum lohe ko kaat kar, paint karke aur sahi buttons lagakar waisa hi board bana denge.
features: Automatic CNC machines se lohe ki cutting aur chhed (punching) karna
Bade copper busbars aur safety buttons lagana
Factory me test karke aapko sahi board dena

title: Chemical Earthing (Shock aur Bijli se Bachne ka Upay)
description: Factory ya ghar me kisi ko bijli ka jhatka na lage, iske liye hum zameen ke andar chemical earthing lagate hain. Yeh normal earthing se 10 guna zyada chalti hai aur poori tarah surakshit hai.
features: Special chemical compound ka istemal jo nammi banaye rakhe
Earthing ke baad check karna ki shock ka khatra bilkul khatam ho gaya
15 saal tak chalne wali earthing bina kharab huye
Kam jagah me lag jata hai, namak aur koyle ki zarurat nahi hoti

title: Bijli ke Boards ki Service aur Checking (AMC)
description: Aapke bijli ke boards kharab na ho aur factory band na ho, iske liye hum har mahine aakar boards ki safai karenge aur check karenge ki koi switch dheela toh nahi hai.
features: Har mahine relay switches ki checking aur wires ko tight karna
Bade circuit breakers ki checking aur lubrication (tel dalna)
Koi switch jal jaye toh turant doosra switch lagana
Emergency ke liye hamare engineers har samay taiyaar
